description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/openapi.json to add a responses object to the POST /widgets operation (201 Created), the only operation missing one. All required top-level fields (openapi, info.title, info.version) were already present, so check_openapi.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_openapi.py: 1 violation — operation 'POST /widgets' is missing a non-empty 'responses' object. Adding a 201 Created response to POST /widgets. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_openapi.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
